frame_analyses.description: Initial setup with suture and needle visible, trainee preparing to load needle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good setup position with clear visualization of materials

frame_analyses.description: Trainee loading needle with suture using proper needle driver grip
Positioning needle for first mark placement on Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Careful approach to first suture placement point

frame_analyses.description: Needle passing through first mark on drain with good angulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper needle trajectory through tissue, appears close to target mark

frame_analyses.description: Completing passage through second mark on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good follow-through on needle passage, suture placement appears accurate

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot, creating initial loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Starting knot tying sequence, proper instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Completing double throw for surgeon's knot as first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appears to be executing surgeon's knot with double wrap correctly

frame_analyses.description: Executing second throw with hand switching, single throw technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good hand switching demonstrated between throws, proper technique

frame_analyses.description: Performing third and final throw with opposite hand orientation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completing knot sequence with appropriate hand switching

frame_analyses.description: Positioning scissors to cut suture ends
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Preparing for suture cutting, good instrument control

frame_analyses.description: Task completed with both suture ends cut, knot secure on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows well-positioned knot with drain slit closed

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed correctly
Good hand switching and single throw technique
Final throw with proper hand switching, knot appears well-secured

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well-closed with no visible gaps, knot positioning appropriate

technique_summary: Solid performance with proper knot tying sequence, appropriate hand switching between throws, and accurate suture placement. The trainee demonstrates improving consistency compared to previous attempts.
improvement_suggestions: Continue practicing to reduce overall completion time
Focus on more precise suture placement to minimize deviation penalties
strengths: Excellent knot tying technique with proper surgeon's knot
